app.sessionExpired: Your session expired due to inactivity. Please sign in again.

home.title: The credit desk that feels as precise as your best operator.
home.description: Bring origination, servicing, payments, associates, and reporting into a premium landing flow while keeping the backend, session store, and existing contracts intact.
home.supportingDescription: Editorial hero, phone mockups, floating badges, and product surfaces now mirror the same visual language as the authenticated workspace.

proofPoints.operations: Collections, payments, and origination in one front door
proofPoints.signals: Actionable signals and live follow-up for the team
proofPoints.roles: Clear experience for admins, customers, and associates

floatingBadges.approvals: Approvals ready to move into servicing

primary.title: Servicing queue
primary.caption: Assignments, promises, and upcoming installments sit inside a mobile-inspired surface that echoes the dashboard experience.

secondary.title: Payment radar
secondary.caption: Installments, partial payments, and associate data read like crisp product cards for operators and leadership alike.

home.featureDescription: Editorial cards, floating badges, and decision blocks give the product a stronger identity while staying inside the Sass, i18n, and component architecture.

features.description: The tools you need under a flawless UI. Discover why top agencies choose us.

split.title: A product story that connects decisions, servicing, and recovery.
split.description: The split section pairs expansive copy on the left with a highly visual operations board on the right.
split.boardTitle: The entire cycle stays visible on one surface
split.boardDescription: Origination, servicing, and reporting remain connected so the hand-off from overview to action feels immediate.

intake.title: Elegant intake, not rigid
intake.description: The landing entry uses long-form copy, pills, and mockups to sell trust without sacrificing functional sign-in and registration.

decisions.title: Decisions backed by data
decisions.description: Each block summarizes what already exists in hooks, stores, and services through a more deliberate visual system.

recovery.title: Recovery as an operating story
recovery.description: The surfaces frame servicing, payments, and reporting as one continuous experience instead of disconnected modules.

experience.title: Bento layout, contrast, and hierarchy built to signal operational sophistication.
experience.description: These blocks mix bright surfaces, deep tones, and gold highlights without falling back to inline styling.

command.title: Command center for origination and collections
command.description: Primary CTA, metrics, and action routes share a lead block that introduces the product story with authority.

routing.title: Clear routing between roles and views
routing.description: The current page-folder, alias, and i18n architecture stays intact while the visual layer gains much stronger character.

transparency.title: Transparency for payments, associates, and portfolio health
transparency.description: Every card emphasizes quick reading, clear states, and natural movement between overview and action.

exports.title: Exports, reporting, and actionable context
exports.description: The lower landing keeps the premium tone with blocks that speak about scale, data, and real operating follow-through.

home.processTitle: From first contact to closeout, every step keeps the same cadence
home.processDescription: The process section carries the hero's editorial language into clear milestones for origination, servicing, and reporting.

captions.origination: Set amounts, terms, and early decisions with a premium presentation that still honors backend contracts.
captions.servicing: Monitor installments, documents, and promises with mockups, cards, and panels built for day-to-day servicing.
captions.reporting: Inspect balances, recovery health, and associate data through reusable bilingual surfaces ready for export.

world.description: Over 1000 users trust our platform to keep their portfolio healthy and stress-free.

bogota.detail: Collections, payments, and daily servicing coordination.

medellin.detail: Regional desks aligned with associates and agents.

miami.detail: Operating expansion with executive context for leadership.

cta.title: Make the first touchpoint with CrediCobranza feel as refined as the internal operation.
cta.description: Use the hero to sign in or open registration without losing the premium narrative that now anchors the landing.

home.authCardDescription: Switch between sign in and registration without leaving the landing or breaking the hero composition.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Log in to your account to manage loans

hero.description: The premium all-in-one platform to manage originations, collections, and track clients with maximum precision and elegance.

bento.panel1Text: Our proven expertise in financial services means your portfolio is managed with the best software.
bento.panel2Title: The brightest minds do the hard research.
bento.panel2Text: So you can make truly prudent decisions about your money without friction and focus 100% on expanding your agency.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to continue managing your lending operation.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Set up your customer profile and enter the workspace with the same backend flow.
register.name: Full name
register.success: Registration successful. You are now signed in.
register.switch: Already have an account? Sign in

dashboard.title: Keep lending activity, recovery, and planning in one financial cockpit
dashboard.subtitle: This workspace keeps lending, recovery, and planning in a bilingual, Sass-driven page backed by the same report, loan, and payment queries.

loading.title: Loading dashboard
loading.message: Collecting portfolio, recovery, and balance signals for this workspace.

dashboard.errorMessage: We could not load the latest dashboard information.

cards.title: My cards
cards.prompt: What would you like to do

premium.title: Go premium
premium.description: Explore all banking functions with Lifetime membership

agents.title: Manage the collection roster from one admin-managed workspace
agents.subtitle: Agent contact visibility, history, and status tracking now live in the same page-folder, Sass, and i18n architecture as the rest of the frontend without treating agents as a sign-in role.

loading.title: Loading agents
loading.message: Fetching the latest collection roster and status information.

summary.totalAgentsCaption: Profiles currently available in the roster

table.title: Agent roster
table.subtitle: Every row keeps identity, contact channels, and availability visible without relying on inline layout styles.
table.emptyMessage: Create the first operational collection record to populate this roster.

modal.title: Add new agent
modal.description: Create an operational roster entry managed by admins and refresh the roster after success.

hero.title: Track EMI activity with one shared payment surface
hero.subtitle: Summary cards, repayment form controls, and history states all follow the same dashboard language used across the authenticated experience.

form.title: Make or review a payment
form.subtitle: Choose a loan, review the EMI and outstanding balance, then submit if your role has payment access.
form.noPayableMessage: Payments can begin once a loan reaches an approved or active servicing state. Return to Loans to review current statuses.
form.adminInfo: Admins can register partial payments and capital payments here. Regular installments and payoff remain customer-only.
form.readonlyInfo: Your role can inspect balances, installments, and history here, but cannot register payments.

eligibility.backendBlocked: The backend confirmed this operation cannot be registered right now.
eligibility.clientBlocked: The UI detected a restriction and blocked the action before submission.
eligibility.loadingHelper: Checking the latest backend rules for this operation.

history.title: Recent transactions
history.subtitle: View transaction history within the dashboard layout so loading, error, and empty states stay consistent.
history.chooseTitle: Choose a loan to view history
history.chooseMessage: Select a payable loan above to load its payment activity and remaining balance.
history.loadingMessage: Fetching the latest transactions for the selected account.
history.emptyMessage: Once a payment is recorded for this loan, it will appear here with the newest transaction first.
history.nearestAnnulNote: * Only the nearest pending or overdue installment can be annulled

calendar.title: Installment calendar
calendar.emptyMessage: Installments with due dates will appear here in calendar format.

payoff.helperText: Full payoff is only enabled when the loan has no overdue installments, still has an outstanding balance, and has no financial block.

capital.helperText: Capital reduction is only enabled when the loan still has balance, is current, and has no financial block.

denialReasons.overduePayoff: You must clear overdue installments before making a payoff.
denialReasons.overdueCapital: You must clear overdue installments before recording a capital payment.
denialReasons.paidMessage: This loan is already paid or has no remaining balance.
denialReasons.noBalanceMessage: This loan has no remaining balance for a capital payment.
denialReasons.financialBlockMessage: This loan has an active financial block and does not allow this operation.
denialReasons.statusMessage: The current loan status does not allow this operation.
denialReasons.defaultMessage: This operation cannot be completed for the selected loan.

workspace.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rejected loan? This action cannot be undone.

mode.title: Switch between portfolio and DAG workbench
mode.subtitle: The DAG view is exposed as an incremental entry point for admins without disrupting the current loans flow.

hero.adminTitle: Manage lending decisions and servicing from one aligned workspace
hero.customerTitle: Apply for loans and follow every document and repayment milestone
hero.subtitle: This page now reads portfolio, servicing, customer documents, and history through the shared TanStack Query foundation.

application.title: Create a new request

portfolio.subtitle: Status decisions, servicing counts, and repayment balances now share the same query-backed table.

servicing.title: Promises, attachments, customer documents, and history
servicing.subtitle: Internal users can manage follow-up tasks and customer files; admins also see the canonical customer history timeline.

dagWorkbench.title: Backend-connected DAG workbench
dagWorkbench.subtitle: This workbench ports the approved DAG canvas, inspector, variables rail, formula preview, and table view on top of the existing backend authoring seams.
dagWorkbench.loadingMessage: Preparing the latest graph, its validation snapshot, and the most recent summary for this scope.
dagWorkbench.emptyGraph: No saved graph exists for this scope yet. You can start from the local draft and save it when ready.

simulation.title: Connected summary
simulation.subtitle: Responses come from the current backend DAG flow for this scope and reuse the shared simulation contract.
